title: Back Support Cushion
content: Engage Africa Back Support Cushion provides ergonomic support for back pain. Price: $29.99. Features: Memory foam, adjustable straps, breathable cover. Helps maintain proper posture while sitting.

title: Muscle Relief Gel
content: Muscle Relief Gel is a cooling gel for muscle pain. Price: R85. Uses: Fast relief for muscle soreness, joint pain, and inflammation. Non-greasy formula, absorbs quickly.

title: Joint Support Tablets
content: Joint Support Tablets for joint health. Price: R120. 60 tablets per bottle. Contains glucosamine and chondroitin. Supports joint flexibility and reduces discomfort.
